prose.en: Employ {param:ac-04.20_odp.01} to control the flow of {param:ac-04.20_odp.02} across security domains.

guidance.en: Organizations define approved solutions and configurations in cross-domain policies and guidance in accordance with the types of information flows across classification boundaries. The National Security Agency (NSA) National Cross Domain Strategy and Management Office provides a listing of approved cross-domain solutions. Contact [ncdsmo@nsa.gov](mailto:ncdsmo@nsa.gov) for more information.

prose.en: {param:ac-04.20_odp.01} are employed to control the flow of {param:ac-04.20_odp.02} across security domains.

objects.en: system configuration settings and associated documentation
list of solutions in approved configurations
Organizational personnel with information flow enforcement responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Mechanisms implementing information flow enforcement functions

guidelines.en: solutions in approved configurations to control the flow of information across security domains are defined;
information to be controlled when it flows across security domains is defined;
